utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 appear in the final package. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) destination: provided (“Lisbon, Portugal”) – fully specified. 2) travel_dates: provided with specific dates (“October 5-9, 2024”) – fully specified. 3) transportation: only “Budget Airlines, Economy Class” and cost €120; lacks flight details (e.g., airline name, flight numbers, times) – not fully specified. 4) accommodation: name “Eco Lodge” and cost €450 – hotel selection with costs is provided; arguably acceptable though no address/dates, but requirement only asks hotel selection with costs – fully specified. 5) activities: list of activities with individual costs – fully specified. 6) additional_services: meals budget €170 – costs included – fully specified. 7) total_budget: “€880” but not a detailed cost breakdown summing each component; while total is stated, a “complete cost breakdown” implies itemized totals; however, items and their costs are given above and sum roughly to €880, but the field itself is just a single number, not a breakdown. Interpreting strictly, the field should include a breakdown, so not fully specified. Therefore, items fully specified: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities, additional_services = 5. Transportation and total_budget are not fully specified. So 5/7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each item named in the final package to the exact entries in the ground-truth ratings. Destination 'Lisbon, Portugal' appears under destinations with rating 6. Transportation type 'Budget Airlines, Economy Class' corresponds to transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class with rating 10. Accommodation 'Eco Lodge' matches accommodation.Eco Lodge rated 10. Activities include 'City Walking Tour' rated 9; 'Sintra-Cascais Natural Park Hiking & Photography Tour' aligns best with the general 'Hiking Expedition' activity rated 10; 'Yoga Class & Vegan Cooking Workshop' spans 'Yoga Retreat' (10) and 'Vegan Cooking Class' (8) but the closest single listed activity is 'Vegan Cooking Class' at the same price €50, however since the package lists it as one combined activity, we map it to 'Vegan Cooking Class' with rating 8; 'Belem Tower & Jerónimos Monastery visit' aligns with 'Museum Day Pass' priced €30 and cultural site visits, rating 7. Additional services list only a meals budget, which has no direct rating entry, so we omit it.
